title: Bubbles Hypixel Skyblock Sound Pack
description: A resourcepack that adds bubbles sounds when you break gemstones in Hypixel Skyblock
body:
This Gemstone Sound Pack - resource pack adds a custom audio when breaking gemstones in Hypixel Skyblock

Gives your gemstones a bubble pop sound when you break them!

The soundpack works between 1.21.4-1.21.11 minecraft versions
Also you have a 1.8 version but it will be discontinued with the new Hypixel changes, I will continue updating the resourcepack to even newer versions.
